title: Worry Yummy Children's Monster Soft Toy - 28cm (11") Soft Cuddly Toy For Kids - Boys & Girls Anxiety, Stress & Fear Reducing Sleep Companion - Purple 'Zipper'
features: MY NAME IS ZIPPER - This Specific Worry Yummy is called Zipper and stands at approx 28cm (11") Tall by 16cm (6 1/2") wide, which makes it a great sleeping companion.
SOOTHE YOUR FEAR - Children's Stress, Anxiety and Fear Relieving Worry Yummy Monster.
EXPRESS THEIR WORRIES - The idea behind our Worry Yummy is to ensure your child can express their fears and worries in a way which will allow them to be more open and honest.

ZIP IT UP - Simply Unzip your Worry Yummy Monsters Mouth and allow your child to place the written worries in and zip it up. When your child is asleep you can then remove the Worries to view them yourself and tell your Child that the Worry Yummy has eaten them.
PEACE OF MIND - This should hopefully make them feel more at ease and will also allow you to have a deeper understanding of what could be worrying your Child.
description: Product description Worry Yummy Children's Monster Soft Toy - 26cm (10") Soft Cuddly Toy For Kids - Boys & Girls Anxiety, Stress & Fear Reducing Sleep Companion - Purple 'ZIPPER' Directions Unzip the monster's mouth, place written worries inside, zip it up, and remove the worries when the child is asleep.
